label: Jaya present-island and Upper Yard historical relationship system

atlas_anchor.warning: The atlas point is deterministic route placement, not canon geography or a source for local bearings.

verified_relationships: Present-day Jaya is the surviving lower-sea portion of a larger historical island.
Mock Town is the present island's settlement and is described by the official arc summary as being on the west side.
Upper Yard is the separated historical portion launched into the sky roughly four hundred years earlier.
Chapter 253 aligns the present Jaya and Upper Yard maps into a skull-like former landmass; this is a relationship proof, not a measured survey.
Upper Yard geometry belongs to the existing Skypiea sky system and must not be duplicated in this asset.
interpolated_relationships: Present coastline, town footprint, cape outline, port geometry, and distances are visual interpolation.
The west-side fact may guide composition, but no compass bearing derived from the atlas is allowed.
The chapter-253 skull alignment is a normalized overlay; exact scale, rotation, seam, and missing coastline remain unmeasured.
topology.transformation_policy: The runtime present-day Jaya model never separates. Historical overlays are opt-in explanatory references unlocked at chapters 253 and 292; they must not replace or move current Jaya or duplicate Upper Yard.

chapter_logic.default_rule: Render present-day components only when their reveal gate is reached; historical overlays remain default_hidden and require an explanatory mode.
chapter_logic.unknown_gate_rule: Do not infer the missing landmass seam, exact historical rotation, launch trajectory, distance to Skypiea, or Knock Up Stream placement.

proposed_local_scene_layout.root: JAYA_ROOT at local origin with sea-level Z=0

zones.placement: normalized coastline; skull-like absence suggested only after chapter 253
west-designated side in local composition; exact bearing withheld
separate readable cape; distance and side interpolated

zones.purpose: align an external Skypiea Upper Yard proxy in authoring/debug overlays
zones.placement: stored as a transform hypothesis with no canon-unit claim

proposed_local_scene_layout.camera_read: Present Jaya remains grounded. Explanatory mode can pull back to show a translucent Upper Yard proxy completing the historical silhouette without instantiating a second Upper Yard mesh.

unreal_runtime_reuse.unreal_notes: Use a soft object reference or level-instance socket for the canonical Upper Yard asset. Never package a copy inside Jaya. Historical alignment should be a translucent debug/exposition layer, not a physical world transform.
unreal_runtime_reuse.map_runtime_notes: Resolve Upper Yard through the existing skypiea-sky-system asset registry when available. If absent, keep the proxy hidden rather than substituting invented land.
unreal_runtime_reuse.lod_policy: Preserve the present-island void/silhouette and Mock Town cluster; collapse port and salvage props first.

coordinate_policy.warning: The Jaya/Upper Yard fit is a source-backed identity relationship but not an exact dimensional transform.

integration_contract.node_gate_policy: Read component_id, reveal_chapter, classification, verification, and default_hidden from glTF extras.

unresolved: Exact current and historical coastline geometry, scale, rotation, seam, and dimensions are not measured by the selected sources.
The chapter-253 skull-map relationship permits a normalized overlay but not a panel-exact 3D transform.
Exact bearings and distances among Mock Town, the port, Cricket's cape, and the Knock Up Stream are withheld.
The historical launch trajectory and geometry deformation remain abstract; only the identity relationship is verified.
Upper Yard must be reused from its own system; if no compatible runtime component exists, the relationship overlay remains withheld.
